---
title: "Teaching"
output: 
  distill::distill_article
---

**Courses Taught**

[ISE 201: Math Foundations for Data Science and Decision Science](./ISE201.html)
Fall 2020, Fall 2021, Spring 2022, Fall 2022, Spring 2023, Fall 2023, Spring 2024, Fall 2024

[ISE 194: Analytics Workshop](./ISE194.html)
Spring 2020, Spring 2021, Spring 2022, Fall 2022, Spring 2023

[ISE 244: AI Tools and Processes](./ISE244.html)
Spring 2022, Spring 2023, Spring 2024

[ISE 202: Design of Experiments](./ISE202.html)
Summer 2022, Spring 2024

ISE 233: Operational Analytics
Spring 2024

ISE 235: Quality Assurance and Reliability
Fall 2024

ISE 205: Data Ethics
Fall 2024

CMPE: Machine Learning
Summer 2024
